{{Youmay|ship also called ''Hieroglyph''|[[Writing/Legends|writing system]] of [[hieroglyphics]]}}
The '''''Asaari Wind''''' was a luxury yacht stolen from [[Bimm (disambiguation)|Bimm]] crimelord [[Ritinki]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] by [[Cecil Noone]] and his partners-in-crime. Ritinki was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the course of the theft. At various times, it operated under the aliases '''''Hieroglyph''''', '''''Spiraling Shape''''', '''''Tailchaser''''', and '''''Voona's Dream II'''''.

{{Ship-stub}}
